abstract: A dictionary key whose value is the shared password.
overview:
## Discussion

The dictionary returned by the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecRequestSharedWebCredential(_:_:_:)] function includes this key to provide you with the password.

You can also access the server’s URL and the user name from this dictionary. To access the server, use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrServer] constant. To access the user name, use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccount] constant. These constants are part of the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/keychain-services] API, and in particular are listed among the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/item-attribute-keys-and-values].

# kSecSharedPassword

**Global Variable**

A dictionary key whose value is the shared password.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecSharedPassword: CFString
```

## Discussion

The dictionary returned by the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecRequestSharedWebCredential(_:_:_:)] function includes this key to provide you with the password.

You can also access the server’s URL and the user name from this dictionary. To access the server, use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrServer] constant. To access the user name, use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccount] constant. These constants are part of the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/keychain-services] API, and in particular are listed among the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/item-attribute-keys-and-values].
title: kSecSharedPassword
